sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43006" key="e(stiouxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑστιουχ-έω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n43006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preside over the home</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">state,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄρχοντες ἑ. πόλεως καὶ πολιτῶν σωτηρίας</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Charond.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
